updates.note: Oeko facility assessment reports delivered — Recyclers Ghana (Jun 23, draft pending EPA OK) and New Energy/Chinese facility (Jun 25); team reviewing. Hiru + Lauren building tiering 2x2 (feasibility vs impact) and research-questions/hypotheses framework off the reports.

Tiering methodology work active with Lauren — drafting research questions/hypotheses and a feasibility-vs-impact 2x2 for Ghana recyclers, grounded in the Oeko facility reports; debate underway on which technical features (furnace/baghouse vs culvert) drive harm.

BI Research & Methods Lead hiring materials finalized and circulated to Jess/Lauren Jun 23; Chris Kinally (Pure Earth) and Nathan Lazarus (MIT) advising on candidate profile (strong environmental scientist, don't over-index on lead); public posting to go live early the week of Jun 29.

updates.task: Nigeria relationship follow-ups from CGD week
updates.note: IDinsight engaged — India leads connected with BK + Niraj on Battery Index; team deciding to reach out to IDinsight Nigeria for lay of the land (Hiru/Lauren to own). Lauren adapting the MRI Ghana SOW to prep Nigeria partner calls over the next three weeks.

updates.task: Firm the relationship — agreement, roles, data, funding
updates.note: Draft partnership proposal to scale Battery Index sent to Drew & Nida (Jun 18); Drew reviewing internally (Programs team wasn't in London); scoping call being scheduled for week of Jul 6 (Genesis coordinating).

Strategy Weekly resumed Jun 25 (Action Lab report + landscape mapping); new Battery Index weekly cadence (Mondays, two alternating bi-weekly groups through Nigeria) being set up; team reorganizing Slack channels into Pb Action / Battery Index / Supply Chain / Research.

updates.headline: Oeko facility reports (Recyclers Ghana, New Energy) in team review and feeding the pilot final report + tiering methodology; Science Lead posting goes live early the week of Jun 29.
IDinsight engaged as a Battery Index partner; Nigeria prep underway — adapting the Ghana SOW for partner calls over the next three weeks.
Draft partnership proposal with Drew & Nida; Pure Earth reviewing internally, scoping call being set for the week of Jul 6.
